calendar.matters:
NOTICE OF NEW HEARING DATE AND ORDER ON REISSUANCE (ELDER OR DEPENDENT ADULT ABUSE)
Off Calendar Nov-07-2012 Denied
MINI MINUTES: hearing held, see mini minutes in case #296121

NOTICE OF COURT HEARING (ELDER OR DEPENDENT ADULT ABUSE)
Off Calendar Oct-24-2012 Continued To Nov-07-12 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: The following four cases were called together: PED-12-296121 Caridad Gascon vs. Dominador Gascon, PED-12-296122 Caridad Gascon vs. Josephine Gascon, PED-12-296130 Caridad Gascon vs. Melanie Gascon and PED-12-296131 Caridad Gascon vs. Alexander Gascon.

Appearances: Caridad Gascon (Petitioner). Marc Branco for and with Dominador Gascon, Josephine Gascon, Melanie Gascon and Alexander Gascon (Respondents). Teofilo Gascon, Jr. (Son)

Teofilo Gascon, Jr. stated he is the interpreter for his mother but his English is not very good and that his mother expected to have an interpreter provided for her. He requested to have the hearing postponed to get an interpreter and a lawyer. Mr. Branco objected to Teofilo speaking for his mother. The Court overruled his objection in this situation. Mr. Branco argued that two of his clients are being displace from their home and that the lack of preparation is not good cause for continuance. The Court questioned Teofilo if anyone has explained to the Petitioner that the orders required her son and daughter-in-law to move out prior to the hearing. Teofilo confirmed that he was present and that there were an intepreter for the Petitioner. The Court wants to decide the cases on the merits and a request for interpreter should have been made by the Petitioner. The four matters were continued to November 7, 2012 at 1:30 p.m., in Dept. 204. The TRO in case number PED-12-296121 and PED-12-296121 are extended to November 7, 2012 (Four Notice of New Hearing Date and Order on Reissuance signed in open court). The Petitioner must prepare to proceed with or without an attorney. Teofilo can not act as spokesman or attorney for the Petitioner. No further service is required because all parties were given a copy of the order.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Court Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077 . Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy M. Benton.
